markdown.markdown:
Status: Provisional (Sept '25')

Report being analysed: United Nations, Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change, _[IPCC Sixth Assement Report (AR6)](https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/syr/)_

Purpose and scope of the corpus quantification exercise: The purpose is to identify the significant properties of AR6 and catalogue these in a knowledge graph. The scope is determined by what is identified as significant properties and if it is possible to count the items given available resources or if they are necessary to the knowledge graph.

## AR6 quantification - version 1.0 (manual count) 

  - A scoping literature review shows no _comprehensive_ AR6 or IPCC Assement Reports quantification.
  - We believe what has been collected is the first attempt at such measurement.
  - An automated count will be carried out using [TIB Grobi](https://projects.tib.eu/grobi) software in Q4 2025.
  - Data sources and data collection will take place in a follow up report.

## Summary

Item | Count | Status
-- | -- | --
Number of reports | 7 | Definitive
Open access license | 6 | Definitive
Report DOIs (top level) | 7 | Good
Page count | 10,047 | Approx.
Word count | 8,047,000 | Approx.
Authors | 1,106 | Approx *
References | 48,400 | Approx. *
SYR Notes | - | To be confirmed
Figures | 1,672 | Approx. 
Data | 66,834 | Approx. *
Glossary terms | 925 | Good
Acronyms | 3041 | Approx. *
Index terms | 5463 | Approx. *
Translations | See [other table](#translations) |  
Wikidata entries (report top level) | 13 | Approx.
Wikidata entries - data types | - | To be confirmed

\* Contains duplicates

## Data, full stats, and methods 

[https://github.com/TIBHannover/climate-knowledge-graph/issues/18](https://github.com/TIBHannover/climate-knowledge-graph/issues/18).  

## What is the AR6 report

AR6 is comprised of seven reports:

 - the Synthesis Report (referred to as SYR)
 - the 3 Working group reports (referred to as WGI, WGII, WGIII)
 - the 3 Special reports (referred to as SR1.5, SRCCL, SROCC)

| Report  | File name / source | File size in MB | Approx. page count | Approx. word count |
| -------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- |
| AR6 Synthesis Report: Climate Change 2023 (SYR)  | IPCC_AR6_SYR_FullVolume.pdf / https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/syr/  | 4.9  | 186 + 14 pages | ~**94.000**   |
| Climate Change 2021: The Physical Science Basis (WG1) | IPCC_AR6_WGI_FullReport.pdf / https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/wg1/ | 423.3    | 2409 pages   |  ~**1.925.000** |
| Climate Change 2022: Impacts, Adaptation and Vulnerability (WG2)   | IPCC_AR6_WGII_FullReport.pdf / https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/wg2/ | 396  | 3068 + 12 pages  |  ~**2.513.000**   |
| Climate Change 2022: Mitigation of Climate Change (WG3)  | IPCC_AR6_WGIII_FullReport.pdf / https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/wg3/ | 68.8  | 2042 + 11 pages  |  ~**1.642.000**  |
| Special Report: Global Warming of 1.5°C (2018) (SR1.5) | SR15_Full_Report_HR.pdf / https://www.ipcc.ch/sr15/ | 65   | 631 pages  | ~**511.000**    |
| Special Report: Climate Change and Land (2019) (SRCCL)  | SRCCL_Full_Report.pdf / https://www.ipcc.ch/srccl/  | 44.9  | 908 pages  | ~**735.000**  |
| Special Report: The Ocean and Cryosphere in a Changing Climate (2019) (SROCC)  | SROCC_FullReport_FINAL.pdf / https://www.ipcc.ch/srocc/ | 51.9   | 766 pages  | ~**627.000**    |
| **Total** |  |   1054.8 MB | 10047 pages | ~8.047.000 |

### What has been counted

 1. Number of reports
 1. PDF Page count, Word count
 1. PDF Licencing information and DOIs
 1. AR6 Citations / references: Bibtex downloads, reference count
 1. AR6 Authors count
 1. Wikidata entries of AR6 reports
 1. AR6 Figures count
 1. AR6 Data count
 1. AR6 Glossary count
 1. AR 6 report translations
 1. AR6 Acronyms
 1. AR6 Index terms

| Climate Change 2021: The Physical Science Basis (WGI) | https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/wg1/resources/translations/  | 5 | 2, partial |
| Climate Change 2022: Impacts, Adaptation and Vulnerability (WG2)    |  https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/wg2/resources/translations/  |  5 | 3 x SPM |
| Climate Change 2022: Mitigation of Climate Change (WG3)  |  https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/wg3/resources/translations/  |  5 |  1 x SPM |
| Special Report: Global Warming of 1.5°C (2018) (SR1.5) |  Some translations here https://www.ipcc.ch/sr15/download/, "UN and other languages"   |   5 | 4 x SPM |
| Special Report: Climate Change and Land (2019) (SRCCL)  | Some translations here https://www.ipcc.ch/srccl/download/ , "SPM in UN Languages", "SPM in other languages" |  5 x SPM | 3 x SPM |
| Special Report: The Ocean and Cryosphere in a Changing Climate (2019) (SROCC)  | Some translations here https://www.ipcc.ch/srocc/download/, "UN and other languages" |  5 x SPM | 5 x SPM |
